description_long: This bungalow is a two-story residential building with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a light-colored exterior and a prominent gable roof with gray tiling. The front facade includes a covered porch area and a carport, with large windows providing ample natural light. The side elevations display a mix of small and medium-sized windows, arranged asymmetrically, and a secondary entrance or utility area. The rear of the bungalow features a balcony on the upper floor, supported by posts, and additional windows that overlook the backyard. The structure sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, with functional outdoor spaces and a focus on simplicity.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a gable roof, light exterior, covered porch, carport, and asymmetrical window arrangement, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, carport, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end, small windows, and a simple entry step.
description_view_2: Rear view with a balcony, supporting posts, and a mix of window sizes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the upper balcony, additional windows, and the extended roofline.
